name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [i \in 1..N |-> state[i] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = idle

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = \IF state[i] = idle THEN trying
                                            \ELSE \IF state[i] = trying THEN critical
                                            \ELSE idle]
          /\ turn' = \IF state[i] = trying /\ turn = i THEN i
                                 \ELSE turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ (* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepare"
     /\ participantStates' = participantStates
  \/ (* Participants vote yes or no *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
     /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ participantStates[p] = "Prepare"
        /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
        /\ \E vote \in {"VoteYes", "VoteNo"} :
           /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = vote]
           /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = vote]
           /\ coordinatorState' = coordinatorState
  \/ (* Coordinator decides to commit *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteYes"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
  \/ (* Coordinator decides to abort *)
     /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
     /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteNo"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
  \/ (* Participants commit or abort *)
     /\ coordinatorState \in {"Commit", "Abort"}
     /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ participantStates[p] = coordinatorState
        /\ messages[p] = coordinatorState
        /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = coordinatorState]
        /\ messages' = messages
        /\ coordinatorState' = coordinatorState

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = <<>>
       /\ flag = <<>>
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = Append(num, 0)
       /\ flag' = Append(flag, FALSE)
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxNum = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxNum + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
             /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1) \\
                \/ /\ readers' = Tail(readers) \\
             \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1) \\
                \/ /\ readers' = Tail(readers) \\
                \/ /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmitCount \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = {}
    /\ channel = {}

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ i \in retransmitCount
            => retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ i \notin retransmitCount
            => retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
        /\ i \in retransmitCount
            /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES
            => /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunks[i]}
               /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ i \in retransmitCount
            /\ retransmitCount[i] > MAX_RETRIES
            => /\ channel' = channel
               /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ i \notin retransmitCount
            => /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunks[i]}
               /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ \E msg \in channel :
        /\ msg \in channel
            => channel' = channel \setminus {msg}
        /\ msg \notin channel
            => channel' = channel

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>> ==

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Key, Value

VARIABLES data, snapshot, txState, txWrites, txReadSet, txWriteSet, txStartVersion, txVersion, txID, txCounter
TypeOK ==
  /\ data \in [Key -> Value]
  /\ snapshot \in [Key -> Value]
  /\ txState \in {"idle", "active", "committed", "aborted"}
  /\ txWrites \in [Key -> Value]
  /\ txReadSet \in SUBSET Key
  /\ txWriteSet \in SUBSET Key
  /\ txStartVersion \in Nat
  /\ txVersion \in Nat
  /\ txID \in Nat
  /\ txCounter \in Nat

\* Initial state
Init ==
  /\ data = [k \in Key |-> 0]   \* All keys initialized to 0
  /\ snapshot = data
  /\ txState = "idle"
  /\ txWrites = [k \in Key |-> 0]
  /\ txReadSet = {}
  /\ txWriteSet = {}
  /\ txStartVersion = 0
  /\ txVersion = 0
  /\ txID = 0
  /\ txCounter = 0

\* Transaction actions
BeginTx ==
  /\ txState = "idle"
  /\ txID' = txCounter + 1
  /\ txCounter' = txCounter + 1
  /\ txStartVersion' = txVersion
  /\ snapshot' = data
  /\ txState' = "active"
  /\ txWrites' = [k \in Key |-> 0]
  /\ txReadSet' = {}
  /\ txWriteSet' = {}

Read(k) ==
  /\ txState = "active"
  /\ k \in Key
  /\ txReadSet' = txReadSet \cup {k}
  /\ txWrites' = txWrites
  /\ snapshot' = snapshot
  /\ txState' = txState
  /\ txStartVersion' = txStartVersion
  /\ txVersion' = txVersion
  /\ txID' = txID

Write(k, v) ==
  /\ txState = "active"
  /\ k \in Key
  /\ v \in Value
  /\ txWriteSet' = txWriteSet \cup {k}
  /\ txWrites' = [txWrites EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  /\ snapshot' = snapshot
  /\ txState' = txState
  /\ txStartVersion' = txStartVersion
  /\ txVersion' = txVersion
  /\ txID' = txID

Commit ==
  /\ txState = "active"
  /\ \A k \in txWriteSet : data[k] = snapshot[k]
  /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![k] = txWrites[k] \in txWriteSet]
  /\ txState' = "committed"
  /\ txWrites' = [k \in Key |-> 0]
  /\ txReadSet' = {}
  /\ txWriteSet' = {}
  /\ txStartVersion' = txStartVersion
  /\ txVersion' = txVersion + 1
  /\ txID' = txID
  /\ snapshot' = data

Abort ==
  /\ txState = "active"
  /\ txState' = "aborted"
  /\ txWrites' = [k \in Key |-> 0]
  /\ txReadSet' = {}
  /\ txWriteSet' = {}
  /\ txStartVersion' = txStartVersion
  /\ txVersion' = txVersion
  /\ txID' = txID
  /\ snapshot' = data

Next ==
  \/ BeginTx
  \/ Read(k) \in Key
  \/ Write(k, v) \in Key \times Value
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, snapshot, txState, txWrites, txReadSet, txWriteSet, txStartVersion, txVersion, txID, txCounter>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets' = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[j])]
        /\ clocks' = [j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j] + offsets[j]]

Avg(c) == (1 \div N) * \Sum i \in 1..N : c[i]

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free' : p' = p \implies p' \in allocated[c] \cup {p} \else p' \in allocated[c]]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
       \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free' : p' = p \implies p' \in allocated[c] \cup {p} \else p' \in allocated[c]]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
        /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
        /\ \A c \in Clients : IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])

---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = 1
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants = 1
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts



(* --type invariant
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* --initial state
Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --next state
Next == \/ /\ \E n \in Node : counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [k \in Node |-> counts[n][k] + 1]]
   \/ /\ \E n, m \in Node : counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]]
*)

(* --global count
GlobalCount == Sum([n \in Node |-> Max({counts[n][m] : m \in Node})])
*)

(* --invariant that all nodes agree on GlobalCount
AllAgree == /\ \A n \in Node : GlobalCount = Sum([m \in Node |-> Max({counts[n][k] : k \in Node})])
*)

(* --property that all nodes agree on GlobalCount
AllAgreeProp == []AllAgree
*)

(* --specification with invariant
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* TLC configuration
SPECIFICATION Spec
INVARIANT TypeOK
*)
